summary: The change broadens retries beyond the issue requirements and omits client-error coverage.

findings.title: Retry policy includes client errors and a fourth attempt
findings.evidence: The loop uses range(4), and every response with status >= 400 reaches another iteration.
findings.reasoning: The issue limits retries to 5xx responses and three total attempts, so 4xx responses must return immediately.
findings.recommendation: Return 4xx responses immediately and cap the loop at three total attempts.

findings.title: No test protects the no-retry behavior for 4xx
findings.evidence: The added test covers eventual recovery from 5xx but has no 4xx case.
findings.reasoning: Without a client-error test, the unintended 4xx retry behavior can regress unnoticed.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4xx response test asserting one transport call and immediate return.

limitations: This deterministic replay does not execute the synthetic fixture.
